props.message:
The Null Door stands closed.

Your eyes find nothing past it. The breath of Lirien stops a few paces from the threshold and resumes a few paces past it on this side. There is no past it on its side.

WARNING

Do not approach within three paces of the door.
The rule is older than the warden.
The rule is older than the warning.

Carved into the stone frame:

"DO NOT KNOCK.
NO ONE WILL ANSWER
IN A WAY YOU CAN HEAR."

props.open_message: The Glim Mirror. Lirien's true silver, beaten thin and blessed cool. It will catch what Init throws — and throw it back.

root.speaker: Watcher Velm
root.text: *Velm does not turn from the door.* Three paces back, traveller. The door is not for knocking. It is for listening.

others.speaker: Watcher Velm
others.text: A small grey-cloaked figure, recent. Did not knock. Stayed three paces back. Listened. Walked back the way they came. *Velm seems to approve.*

teach.speaker: Watcher Velm
teach.text: Then listen now. *Velm hums, low and slow.* Left... down... left... down... right. The moon-marked gates open to it. So do certain other things. Be careful which.

remembered.speaker: Watcher Velm
remembered.text: *Velm nods once and resumes their watch.*
